basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Mangalagiri Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Mangalagiri
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Mangalagiri (AIIMS Mangalagiri) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Associate II Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

application_fee.all_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Project Associate-II: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Upper age limit may be relaxed as per Govt. of India rules.

qualification.details: Project Associate-II: Four-year Bachelor's Degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine, or a Master's Degree in Biotechnology/Bioinformatics or allied Life Sciences from a recognized University or equivalent. Two years' experience in R&D in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and Services.

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹42,000/- per month + HRA or ₹33,000/- per month + HRA
salary_details.details: Project Associate-II: ₹42,000/- per month + HRA for candidates selected through (i) CSIR-UGC NET (including LS)/GATE or (ii) a national-level examination conducted by Central Government Departments, their Agencies, or Institutions. Project Associate-II: ₹33,000/- per month + HRA for candidates not falling under the above category.

selection_process: Document Verification Walk-in Interview Written test may be conducted if the number of candidates applied is more.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Mangalagiri Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 13-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Mangalagiri Project Associate II Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Mangalagiri Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 13-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Mangalagiri Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Mangalagiri Project staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your CV via email is 13-07-2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Associate-II position under the ANRF-Extramural Project at AIIMS Mangalagiri.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a four-year Bachelor's Degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine, or a Master's Degree in Biotechnology/Bioinformatics or allied Life Sciences.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any experience required for the Project Associate-II position?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must have at least two years of experience in R&D in industrial and academic institutions or science and technology organizations.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-II post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-II position is 35 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q6. How will the candidates be selected for this project staff role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Document Verification and a Walk-in Interview. A written test might be conducted if there are many applicants.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-II position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is ₹42,000/- per month + HRA or ₹33,000/- per month + HRA, depending on the candidate's qualifications and selection criteria.

faq.question: Q8. How should I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to email their updated CV to [email protected] on or before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS Mangalagiri located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Mangalagiri is located in Mangalagiri, Andhra Pradesh.

faq.question: Q10. Will there be any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.
